title: lathyrus variegatus
intro: Lathyrus variegatus, also known as the variegated pea or variegated vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its seeds and flowers are rich in nutrients and have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the seeds and flowers of Lathyrus variegatus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
